name: The Villainess Is Adored by the Prince of the Neighbor Kingdom
original_name: 悪役令嬢は隣国の王太子に溺愛される
overview: Tiararose Lapis Clamentile is set to marry Hartknights, crown prince of Lapis Lazuli—until she suddenly remembers her past life and realizes she’s been reincarnated into her favorite game, The Ring of Lapis Lazuli, as the doomed villainess! But just as she’s about to lose hope, the crown prince of Aquasteed proposes instead. Could this unexpected turn finally lead to a happy ending of her own?
